name: LiXinyangFHIRInteropR4
title: Li Xinyang FHIR-Native Interoperability and Data-Quality Framework (R4)
description: Draft, machine-consumable FHIR R4 implementation guide translating the independently developed interoperability and data-quality methodology into profiles, terminology artifacts, structural maps, provenance, validation, and example exchange bundles.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Allergy Intolerance
resource.description: Allergy profile designed to reduce silent loss of allergy and intolerance data.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Audit Event
resource.description: Security and access audit event for the exchange gateway.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Care Plan
resource.description: Care plan profile for longitudinal exchange and patient summary construction.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Care Team
resource.description: Care team profile with mandatory participation and period.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Composition
resource.description: Composition profile for structured clinical documents and patient summaries.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Condition
resource.description: Condition profile with mandatory clinical status, verification, category, code, onset, and recording date.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Consent
resource.description: Consent profile supporting consent-aware exchange governance.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Coverage
resource.description: Coverage profile for payer and beneficiary context.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Device
resource.description: Device profile used for source systems and clinical devices.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Device Use Statement
resource.description: Device-use profile linked to a canonical patient and device.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Diagnostic Report
resource.description: Diagnostic report profile linking coded reports to canonical observations.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Document Reference
resource.description: Document profile used by MDM and C-CDA document exchange.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Encounter
resource.description: Encounter profile with mandatory identity, patient, period, and service organization.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Episode of Care
resource.description: Episode-of-care profile for longitudinal cross-institutional grouping.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Exchange Bundle
resource.description: Validated output bundle carrying canonical resources, inline quality observations, and provenance.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Goal
resource.description: Goal profile for longitudinal care-plan exchange.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Immunization
resource.description: Immunization profile with normalized vaccine coding and occurrence.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Location
resource.description: Location profile for encounter and source-system context.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Medication
resource.description: Medication dictionary entry for RxNorm, NDC, or locally governed coded medication concepts.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Medication Administration
resource.description: Medication administration profile for actual administration events.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Medication Request
resource.description: Medication order profile with mandatory requester, date, and dosage instruction.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Medication Statement
resource.description: Medication history statement profile used for C-CDA medication extraction.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Observation
resource.description: Canonical observation profile supporting coded, attributable, temporally normalized results.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Organization
resource.description: Organization profile for institutions participating in exchange.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Patient
resource.description: Strict-at-core patient identity profile for cross-institutional exchange.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Practitioner
resource.description: Practitioner profile used for attribution, review, and provenance.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Practitioner Role
resource.description: Role profile binding a practitioner to an organization and function.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Procedure
resource.description: Procedure profile for normalized procedural history.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Provenance
resource.description: Append-only resource-level lineage record for mapping, validation, and terminology operations.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Questionnaire Response
resource.description: Questionnaire response profile for structured patient-reported and clinical data.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Related Person
resource.description: Related-person profile linked to a canonical patient.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Service Request
resource.description: Order and referral profile used by ORM structural mapping.

resource.name: HITC Canonical Specimen
resource.description: Specimen profile supporting laboratory result traceability.

resource.name: HITC Data Quality Metric Observation
resource.description: Inline quality metric emitted by the exchange validation pipeline.

resource.name: HITC Laboratory Observation
resource.description: Laboratory observation constrained to laboratory category and UCUM quantity units.

resource.name: HITC Mapping Confidence
resource.description: Decimal confidence score from zero through one for a terminology mapping.

resource.name: HITC Mapping Reviewer
resource.description: Identifies the person or role that reviewed a terminology mapping.

resource.name: HITC Mapping Strategy
resource.description: Records the strategy used to resolve a source concept.

resource.name: HITC Merkle Root
resource.description: Hex-encoded Merkle root or transaction hash used for tamper-evident lineage.

resource.name: HITC Original Source Code
resource.description: Preserves the source code before terminology translation.

resource.name: HITC Quality Metric Denominator
resource.description: Denominator used to calculate a quality metric.

resource.name: HITC Quality Metric Numerator
resource.description: Numerator used to calculate a quality metric.

resource.name: HITC Source Format
resource.description: Identifies the source payload format before structural mapping.

resource.name: HITC Source System
resource.description: Identifies the originating institution or source application for an exchanged resource.

resource.name: HITC Transformation Step
resource.description: Records a transformation or normalization step applied to the target resource.

resource.name: HITC Validation Stage
resource.description: Identifies a validation stage executed against the resource.

resource.name: C-CDA Section Entry Logical Model
resource.description: Normalized intermediate representation for C-CDA medication, problem, allergy, procedure, and discharge-medication entries.

resource.name: HL7 v2 MSH Logical Model
resource.description: Representative message-header fields used by the canonical envelope and provenance pipeline.

resource.name: HL7 v2 OBR Logical Model
resource.description: Representative OBR fields used by the DiagnosticReport structure map.

resource.name: HL7 v2 OBX Logical Model
resource.description: Representative OBX fields used by the Observation structure map.

resource.name: HL7 v2 ORC Logical Model
resource.description: Representative ORC fields used by the ServiceRequest structure map.

resource.name: HL7 v2 PID Logical Model
resource.description: Representative PID fields used by the Patient structure map.

resource.name: HL7 v2 PV1 Logical Model
resource.description: Representative PV1 fields used by the Encounter structure map.

resource.name: HL7 v2 SCH Logical Model
resource.description: Representative scheduling fields used by the SIU-to-Encounter structure map.

resource.name: HL7 v2 TXA Logical Model
resource.description: Representative TXA fields used by the MDM-to-DocumentReference structure map.

resource.name: HITC Data Quality Metric Codes
resource.description: Codes for inline data-quality metrics emitted as FHIR Observation resources.

resource.name: HITC Data Quality Metric Value Set
resource.description: The six quality metrics defined by the interoperability methodology.

resource.name: HITC Mapping Strategy Codes
resource.description: Resolution strategies used by the terminology bridge.

resource.name: HITC Observation Category Codes
resource.description: Additional observation categories required by the inline data-quality pipeline.

resource.name: HITC Source Format Codes
resource.description: Input formats supported by the mapping methodology.

resource.name: HITC Supported Terminology System Codes
resource.description: The twelve terminology systems identified by the methodology.

resource.name: HITC Transformation Activity Codes
resource.description: Activities recorded in resource-level provenance.

resource.name: HITC Validation Stage Codes
resource.description: Composable validation stages specified by the methodology.

resource.name: HL7 v2 Abnormal Flags to FHIR Observation Interpretation
resource.description: Representative OBX-8 mapping used by the structural and semantic mapping stages.

resource.name: HL7 v2 Administrative Sex to FHIR Administrative Gender
resource.description: Representative exact and governed inexact mappings for PID-8 normalization.

resource.name: HL7 v2 Order Control to FHIR Request Status
resource.description: Representative ORC-1 mapping for ServiceRequest.status.

resource.name: HL7 v2 Patient Class to FHIR Encounter Class
resource.description: Representative PV1-2 mapping for Encounter.class.

resource.name: HL7 v2 Result Status to FHIR DiagnosticReport Status
resource.description: Representative OBR-25 status normalization.

resource.name: HL7 v2 Result Status to FHIR Observation Status
resource.description: Representative OBX-11 status normalization.

resource.name: ICD-9-CM to ICD-10-CM Crosswalk Template
resource.description: Template shell for a governed ICD-9-CM-to-ICD-10-CM crosswalk.

resource.name: Local Clinical Code to SNOMED CT Template
resource.description: Template shell for institution-specific clinical-code mapping to SNOMED CT.

resource.name: Local Laboratory Code to LOINC Template
resource.description: Template shell for institution-specific laboratory-code mapping to LOINC.

resource.name: Local Medication Code to RxNorm Template
resource.description: Template shell for institution-specific medication-code mapping to RxNorm.

resource.name: NDC to RxNorm Crosswalk Template
resource.description: Template shell for a governed NDC-to-RxNorm crosswalk. The mapping content must be supplied from an authorized terminology source.

resource.name: C-CDA Allergy Entry to HITC Canonical AllergyIntolerance
resource.description: XPath-extracted C-CDA allergy entry to AllergyIntolerance structure map.

resource.name: C-CDA Discharge Medication Entry to HITC Canonical MedicationRequest
resource.description: XPath-extracted C-CDA discharge medication entry to MedicationRequest.

resource.name: C-CDA Medication Entry to HITC Canonical MedicationStatement
resource.description: XPath-extracted C-CDA medication entry to MedicationStatement.

resource.name: C-CDA Problem Entry to HITC Canonical Condition
resource.description: XPath-extracted C-CDA problem entry to Condition structure map.

resource.name: C-CDA Procedure Entry to HITC Canonical Procedure
resource.description: XPath-extracted C-CDA procedure entry to Procedure structure map.

resource.name: HL7 v2 OBR to HITC Canonical DiagnosticReport
resource.description: Declarative structural mapping from OBR to DiagnosticReport.

resource.name: HL7 v2 OBX to HITC Canonical Observation
resource.description: Declarative structural mapping from OBX to the canonical Observation profile.

resource.name: HL7 v2 ORC to HITC Canonical ServiceRequest
resource.description: Declarative structural mapping from ORC to ServiceRequest.

resource.name: HL7 v2 PID to HITC Canonical Patient
resource.description: Declarative structural mapping from representative PID fields to the canonical Patient profile.

resource.name: HL7 v2 PV1 to HITC Canonical Encounter
resource.description: Declarative structural mapping from PV1 to the canonical Encounter profile.

resource.name: HL7 v2 SCH to Planned Encounter
resource.description: Representative SIU scheduling map using a planned Encounter target.

resource.name: HL7 v2 TXA to HITC Canonical DocumentReference
resource.description: Declarative MDM/TXA structural mapping to DocumentReference.

resource.name: HITC Federated Patient Summary Operation
resource.description: Decomposes a patient-summary request into institution-specific subqueries, merges results, and returns a canonical Bundle.

resource.name: HITC Interoperability Server Requirements
resource.description: Requirements-level capability statement for a server implementing the draft interoperability framework.

resource.name: HITC Validate Exchange Operation
resource.description: Validates an incoming Bundle through R-SCH, R-REF, R-TERM, and the quality-metrics collector.

resource.name: ObservationValidationStage
resource.description: Search inline quality observations by validation stage.

resource.name: ProvenanceMappingStrategy
resource.description: Search Provenance by the recorded terminology mapping strategy.

grouping.name: Canonical Profiles
grouping.description: Strict-at-core constrained FHIR R4 clinical and administrative resource profiles.

grouping.name: Registered Extensions
grouping.description: Extensions for source identity, mapping provenance, validation stages, quality metrics, and tamper-evident lineage.

grouping.name: Source Logical Models
grouping.description: Normalized logical input models for representative HL7 v2 segments and C-CDA entries.

grouping.name: Terminology and Concept Mapping
grouping.description: CodeSystems, ValueSets, and ConceptMaps used by the terminology bridge.

grouping.name: Structural Mapping
grouping.description: FHIR StructureMap resources for Phase 1 structural transformation.

grouping.name: Synthetic Examples
grouping.description: Synthetic examples demonstrating profiles, inline quality observations, exchange bundles, and provenance.
